title: Ivy's Sound Adventures
synopsis: Baby Ivy discovers different sounds around her home, from one clapping hand to five singing birds, learning to count while exploring the magical world of noise and music.

pages.text: This is Ivy. She loves sounds! Listen with Ivy as she counts sounds around her home.

illustration.description: A cheerful baby girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes, sitting on a colorful rug surrounded by gentle rainbow sound waves flowing through the air
illustration.alt: Baby Ivy sitting with colorful sound waves around her

pages.text: One! Clap, clap! Ivy claps her hands. One sound makes happy circles.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes, clapping her hands with bright yellow circular sound waves radiating outward from her palms
illustration.alt: Ivy clapping with yellow circular sound waves

pages.text: Two! Tap, tap! Two spoons make music. See the dancing sound ribbons!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes, holding two wooden spoons with flowing blue and purple ribbon-like sound waves swirling around them
illustration.alt: Ivy with spoons creating ribbon-like sound waves

pages.text: Three! Ring, ring, ring! Three bells jingle. Look at the sparkly sound stars!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes, shaking three small bells with glittering silver star-shaped sound bursts filling the air around her
illustration.alt: Ivy with bells creating star-shaped sound bursts

pages.text: Four! Meow, meow, meow, meow! Four cats purr. Soft orange sound clouds float by.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes, sitting with four friendly cats while soft orange cloud-like sound shapes drift peacefully above them
illustration.alt: Ivy with four cats and orange sound clouds

pages.text: Five! Tweet, tweet, tweet, tweet, tweet! Five birds sing. Beautiful green sound flowers bloom everywhere!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes, looking up at five colorful birds in a tree with vibrant green flower-shaped sound patterns blooming all around the scene
illustration.alt: Ivy with five singing birds and flower-shaped sound patterns

pages.text: Ivy loves counting sounds! Clap, tap, ring, meow, tweet! What sounds do you hear?

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes, surrounded by a magical symphony of all the sound shapes - circles, ribbons, stars, clouds, and flowers in a rainbow of colors
illustration.alt: Ivy surrounded by all different sound shapes and colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many hands does Ivy clap?
questions.explanation: Ivy makes one clapping sound with her hands together!

questions.question: What do the bells make?
questions.explanation: The three bells make sparkly sound stars when they ring!

questions.question: How many birds sing to Ivy?
questions.explanation: Five birds sing and make beautiful green sound flowers!
